title: koeleria mannagettae
intro: Koeleria mannagettae, also known as Mannagetta's hair grass, is a type of grass species belonging to the family Poaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Koeleria mannagettae include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve congestion, and act as an antiseptic agent. Koeleria mannagettae can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and is sometimes combined with other herbs in traditional medicine to enhance its effects.
